title: API interface frequent timeouts
description: Dingxin Software (CUS-501) reports that their integrated order query API frequently times out during peak hours, with average response time exceeding 10 seconds, severely impacting their business system. This has persisted for 3 days and they request an urgent fix.

title: Export function error
description: Hanhai E-commerce (CUS-502) encounters a 500 error when using the data export function. Unable to export the last 3 months of sales data. Error message: InternalServerError: query timeout.

title: How to batch modify user permissions
description: Public institution user (CUS-503) Teacher Zhang asks how to batch modify permissions for 150 subordinate accounts. Currently only able to modify one by one, which is very inefficient.

title: Severe data sync delay
description: Wantong Logistics (CUS-504) Director Zhao urgently reports: since last night, logistics tracking data sync has been delayed by over 2 hours, causing multiple order statuses to be unable to update in real time, with increasing customer complaints.

title: Report chart display abnormality
description: Hanhai E-commerce (CUS-502) reports that pie charts and bar charts in the report module are not fully displayed, with some data labels overlapping and unreadable. Browser: Chrome 120.
